ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "avatar" TEXT /* Preferred avatar (color scheme) of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customers table */,
  "avg_session_length" REAL /* Average session length of the customer */,
  "time_on_app" REAL /* Time spent by the customer on the app */,
  "time_on_website" REAL /* Time spent by the customer on the website */,
  "length_of_membership" REAL /* Length of membership (in years) */,
  "yearly_amount_spent" REAL /* Yearly amount spent by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_roles table */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customers table */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer_segments table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id")
)
